name: Rumba Cross
following_figure_names: Running Right Turn (5-11 of Running Right Turn, RF fwd, S, into Tipsy to L), Rumba Cross
notes:
If preceding the Rumba Cross with 1-5 Natural Turn, a sway to L would be used on step 5 which could be held at the beginning of step 1 of the Rumba Cross. This sway assists in maintaining forward movement through the turn. The Rumba Cross may be danced twice.
When preceding with a Natural Pivot Turn, S is added before this Q.
Lady's description includes mental forward feeling, hip to Man, etc.
Do not level up shoulders and hips, leaving R side positive. R knee is forward over the toe, completely balanced on RF.

steps.action: to side slightly back, ending with RF fwd in CBMP

steps.amount_of_turn: start to turn R at end of step

steps.action: fwd between partner's feet, end with LF back
steps.alignment: Start Facing LOD, End backing LOD
comments: Pivot, head may turn to R (or keep left). needs to be on the foot, ribs to Man.
Do not level up shoulders and hips, leaving R side positive. R knee is forward over the toe, completely balanced on RF.
